title: Black Clover Manga Ends
content: Tabata launched Black Clover in Weekly Shonen Jump in February 2015. The manga moved to the quarterly Jump Giga magazine in 2023. Viz Media is publishing the manga digitally and in print, and Shueisha 's MANGA Plus service is also publishing the manga digitally.
author: ANN

title: 'Buchigire Reijou wa Houfuku wo Chikaimashita.' Announces Additional Cast, Theme Songs
content: The official website for the Buchigire Reijou wa Houfuku wo Chikaimashita. Madousho no Chikara de Sokoku wo Tatakitsubushimasu ( A Livid Lady's Guide to Getting Even: How I Crushed My Homeland with My Mighty Grimoires ) television anime revealed additional cast, theme songs, and a key visual (pictured) on Friday.
author: MyAnimeList

title: Manga 'Black Clover' Concludes Serialization
content: The Spring issue of Jump GIGA magazine published the 392nd and final chapter of Yuuki Tabata 's Black Clover manga on Friday, concluding its eleven-year serialization. Tabata began serializing the manga in Weekly Shounen Jump in February 2015, after publishing a one-shot in Shounen Jump NEXT! in May 2014.
author: MyAnimeList

title: '100 Girlfriends Who Really, Really, Really, Really, Really Love You' Season 3 Slated for July 5
content: The website for the third television anime season based on Rikito Nakamura and Yukiko Nozawa 's The 100 Girlfriends Who Really, Really, Really, Really, Really Love You ( Kimi no koto ga Dai Dai Dai Dai Daisuki na 100-nin no Kanojo ) manga announced its July 5 premiere and unveiled a key visual and visuals for three…
author: ANN

title: From Old Country Bumpkin to Master Swordsman Season 2 Reveals New Visual, Trailer, July 8 Premiere
content: From Old Country Bumpkin to Master Swordsman Season 2 revealed a new key visual and trailer, as well as a July 8 premiere date. The sequel anime was announced immediately after the first season, which is streaming on Amazon’s Prime Video. Studios Passione and Hayabusa Film are returning to animate.
author: Anime Corner

title: From Old Country Bumpkin to Master Swordsman Season 2's 3rd Video Unveils Opening Song, July 8 Debut
content: NBC Universal debuted the third full promotional video and the key visual for the second anime season based on Shigeru Sagazaki 's From Old Country Bumpkin to Master Swordsman ( Katainaka no Ossan, Kensei ni Naru: Tada no Inaka no Kenjutsu Shihan Datta noni, Taisei Shita Deshitachi ga Ore o Hōttekurenai Ken ) light…
author: ANN

title: A Livid Lady's Guide to Getting Even Anime Announces More Cast, Song Info, AX Preview
content: The entertainment company REMOW unveiled the key visual, more cast members, information on the theme song, and Anime Expo "sneak peek" for the anime of Metabo Hagure 's A Livid Lady's Guide to Getting Even: How I Crushed My Homeland with My Mighty Grimoires ( Buchigire Reijō wa Hōfuku wo Chikaimashita .
author: ANN

title: The 100 Girlfriends Who Really Love You (Hyakkano) Season 3 Reveals Key Visual With 17 Girls, July 5 Premiere
content: The 100 Girlfriends Who Really Love You (Hyakkano) Season 3 revealed a key visual, along with a July 5, 2026 premiere date. Studio Bibury Animation Studios is again in charge of the animation, with Hikaru Sato returning to direct. The new visual features 17 girlfriends, and you can check it out below.
author: Anime Corner

title: A Livid Lady's Guide to Getting Even Anime Unveils New Key Visual, Additional Cast, Theme Songs
content: The previously announced A Livid Lady’s Guide to Getting Even: How I Crushed My Homeland with My Mighty Grimoires anime unveiled a new key visual along with three additional cast members and the opening and ending theme songs. The anime is scheduled to premiere in July 2026.
author: Anime Corner

title: NIPPON SANGOKU Reveals Episode 5 Preview
content: NIPPON SANGOKU revealed the preview images and synopsis for Episode 5, which is set to premiere on Sunday, May 2. Studio Kafka is in charge of the animation. The anime is co-produced with Amazon MGM Studios and is currently streaming weekly on Prime Video.
author: Anime Corner
